turbosmtp_bootstrap_card_subtitle: Auto-create a Consumer Key from your TurboSMTP account credentials.
turbosmtp_bootstrap_method_subtitle: Sign in with your TurboSMTP login. A Consumer Key is minted and stored automatically.
turbosmtp_card_consumer_keys_subtitle: Keys minted on your TurboSMTP account. Used for the mail-send endpoint.
turbosmtp_card_credentials_subtitle: API key talks to analytics + consumer-key management. Consumer key/secret signs the mail-send calls.
turbosmtp_card_engagement_subtitle: Opens, clicks, and unsubscribes captured by TurboSMTP.
turbosmtp_card_stats_subtitle: Send volume and outcomes pulled from the TurboSMTP analytics API.
turbosmtp_card_suppression_subtitle: Local bounce / complaint cache. Synced from TurboSMTP every 15 minutes.
turbosmtp_hero_fresh_body: Walk through a 3-step wizard to bootstrap a Consumer Key from your TurboSMTP account — or paste an existing key pair.
turbosmtp_hero_inactive_body: Credentials are saved and verified, but a different provider is currently delivering your mail. Switch TurboSMTP on to start using it.
turbosmtp_hero_inactive_title: Credentials ready — TurboSMTP is not the active provider
turbosmtp_hero_live_body: TurboSMTP is delivering your mail right now. Use the dashboard below to monitor traffic.
turbosmtp_hero_live_title: All set — mail is flowing through TurboSMTP
turbosmtp_hero_partial_body: We still need: {missing}. Save these in the credentials form to finish setup.
turbosmtp_manual_method_subtitle: You already have an API key + Consumer Key/Secret pair. Paste them into the form below.
turbosmtp_manual_step_subtitle: Fill in the Credentials card below with your API key, Consumer Key, and Consumer Secret, then return here.
turbosmtp_no_sends_yet: No sends in the last 24 hours yet.
turbosmtp_wizard_step1_subtitle: Choose how you'd like to get TurboSMTP credentials.
turbosmtp_wizard_step3_subtitle: Send a test email to confirm the configuration works end-to-end.
